name: AMTECH SYSTEMS INC
summary: Amtech Systems, Inc. is a manufacturer of capital equipment and consumables used in the fabrication of semiconductors, including power semiconductors (silicon and silicon carbide), and related industries. The company produces thermal processing equipment, chemical mechanical planarization (CMP) systems, and related consumables. Products serve applications in electric vehicles, 5G communications, IoT, LED, and industrial electronics markets.

products.name: Thermal Processing Equipment
products.description: Equipment used in semiconductor fabrication, including for power semiconductors such as silicon and silicon carbide devices.

products.name: Chemical Mechanical Planarization (CMP) Systems
products.description: CMP equipment and consumables used in semiconductor wafer processing and planarization.

products.name: Direct Bond Copper (DBC) Equipment
products.description: Equipment related to direct bond copper processing for power semiconductor packaging.
